_meta.note: Coverage of ontology entities/actions by implemented code. First domain modelling (Frente I Permutas, Fatia 1) — ALL artifacts are 'planned' (ontology-only proposal; no src/ implementation in this feature). Coverage percentages are 0 by design until TaskScoper/AutoLoopRunner implement. v0.2.2: network probe (dev tenant Columbia, 2026-06-18, filCod=2, 410 real adiantamentos) RESOLVED P0-3 (filter wire key = docVldTipoAdto=1 / FinDocCab; old placeholder adiantamento#EQ:'S' was a BUG → HTTP 500) and P0-4 (data-base wire fields = cdiDtaCi imp019 / dioDtaDesembaraco imp223; XOR confirmed in real data; aging column now populates). NO P0 gaps remain. NEW gap gate-3-pago-via-detail (P1): TOTALMENTE PAGO status comes null in com298/list — likely in detail endpoint. v0.2.1: Yuri answered P0 gaps — P0-1/P0-5/P0-6/P0-7/P0-8/P1-2 RESOLVED, both stubs promoted to draft. Updated by the OntologyCurator after each accepted feature.
_meta.last_feature: permutas-painel-elegiveis (2026-06-18 probe): P0-3 + P0-4 RESOLVED with empirical network evidence (410 real adiantamentos, filCod=2). New gap gate-3-pago-via-detail (P1). ADR-0004 + addendum + 2026-06-18 probe addendum.
